slides.title: Parallel Operations with Promise.all ⚡

quizData.question: What does `await` do in an async function?

options.text: It pauses the async function until the promise settles
It converts a callback to a promise

quizData.explanation: `await` pauses the async function, not the whole program, until the promise resolves/rejects.
